Name: Commander Tar-Vash
Description: Tar-Vash was a Kree military commander assigned with the stabilization of various border planets of the Kree Empire. He was eventually chosen by the Supreme Intelligence and Ronan the Accuser for mutation to the new Ruul form. The Kree mutated to Ruul could evolve their own bodies to adapt to new enviroments, effectively surviving in situations where a normal Kree would not.
